summary: Iteration 64 - Producer Payments Dashboard testing complete. All 15 backend tests PASSED. Frontend verified: ProducerPayments page renders correctly with 4 stat cards, Stripe Connect banner, monthly chart (Recharts BarChart), recent orders list with expandable items, and monthly breakdown table. Bug fix verified: buy-now with variant_id + pack_id now works correctly.

issues: Recharts warning about negative width/height during initial render - does not affect functionality

passed_tests: GET /api/producer/payments - PASS (200, returns complete earnings data)

GET /api/producer/payments - PASS (all required fields: total_gross, total_net, total_platform_fee, pending_payout, commission_rate, paid_orders, pending_orders, stripe_connected, recent_orders, monthly_summary)
GET /api/producer/payments - PASS (earnings calculation: net = gross - platform_fee)
GET /api/producer/payments - PASS (recent_orders structure valid with items breakdown)
GET /api/producer/payments - PASS (monthly_summary structure with month YYYY-MM format)
GET /api/producer/stats - PASS (all required fields: total_products, approved_products, total_orders, follower_count)
frontend_tests_passed: Stat card: Ventas brutas (data-testid=stat-gross) - VISIBLE, shows 44.48€
Stat card: Tus ganancias (data-testid=stat-net) - VISIBLE, shows 36.47€ (82%)
Stat card: Comision plataforma (data-testid=stat-fees) - VISIBLE, shows 8.01€ (18%)
Stat card: Pago pendiente (data-testid=stat-pending) - VISIBLE, shows 36.47€
Stripe Connect banner (data-testid=stripe-connect-banner) - VISIBLE for unconnected producer
Connect Stripe CTA (data-testid=connect-stripe-cta) - VISIBLE and clickable
Monthly chart (Recharts BarChart) - RENDERED with Bruto (beige) and Neto (green) bars
Recent orders list (data-testid=recent-orders-list) - VISIBLE with 16 orders
Order row expansion (data-testid=order-row-*) - WORKS, shows item breakdown and platform fee
Monthly breakdown table (data-testid=monthly-breakdown) - VISIBLE with febrero 2026 data
Producer Overview page - STILL WORKS, shows health score, stats, Stripe section
critical_code_review_comments: ProducerPayments.js - Well structured component with proper data-testid attributes
GET /producer/payments endpoint at line 6505 - Correctly calculates gross, net, platform_fee from orders
Bug fix verified at line 3594: buy-now now correctly looks for packs inside variant when variant_id is provided
Monthly summary calculation works correctly - groups by YYYY-MM format
Recent orders limited to 20 with full item breakdown
Stripe Connect status correctly checked from both users and stores collections
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 64 tested new ProducerPayments dashboard. All features working: GET /producer/payments returns complete earnings data, frontend renders 4 stat cards, monthly chart, recent orders with expansion, monthly breakdown table. Stripe Connect banner shows for unconnected producers. Buy-now variant+pack bug from iteration 63 is now FIXED. Producer overview page (/producer) still works correctly with health score and stats.

producer_payments_ui.orders_list: Expandable with item breakdown and platform fee
producer_payments_ui.stripe_banner: Shows for unconnected producers with CTA button

buy_now_bug_fix.issue: Pack not found when using variant_id + pack_id
buy_now_bug_fix.fix_location: line 3594 - now correctly looks for packs inside variant

mocked_api_notes: No mocked APIs - all features use real backend implementation
